title: 10 best herbal creams for over bleeding during periods
description: Citrus x aurantium, also known as bitter orange, creams helps with over bleeding during periods because of its natural astringent properties. The high concentration of flavonoids and limonoids present in Citrus x aurantium help to constrict blood vessels and reduce menstrual flow. This natural astringency helps to regulate excessive bleeding, providing relief from heavy menstrual periods.
